test_framework: Custom headless test runner (test-sld.js, run with node)
verification_instructions: Run node test-sld.js and ensure all tests pass (baseline: 1032 passed). New tests must also pass.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Just edit el-dimensionering.html and test-sld.js.
environment_constraints: LIFE-SAFETY CRITICAL app. Every formula must be correct. 100% CLICK-ONLY except analyzer's paste textarea (user explicitly requested). Trilingual: Danish authoritative, English secondary, Farsi via _FA. Dark + light theme, RTL safe.
key_patterns: Module uses tx() for translations, renderModule('analyzer') switch, sel-btn buttons for click-only presets, calcDetail() for detailed calculation output.
